name: glyph-sft-v1-data
format: jsonl, one trace per line, single field `trace` (string)
summary: Dataset that produced the JayZenith/glyph-sft-v1 SFT model. Synthetic TASK traces from GPT-5-mini, with bootstrap + continuation rollouts, postprocessed and patched.

lineage.purpose: seed traces from a stronger teacher model to bootstrap the format
lineage.teacher_model: GPT-5-mini (per filename convention; not recorded in trace metadata)
lineage.exact_flags_used: UNKNOWN — no committed launch script and no trace metadata

UNKNOWN — synthesis flags were not committed at time of run. Going forward, every trace gets a `meta` field with {teacher_model, sampling_params, prompt_id, timestamp} written at synthesis time so this stage's record is no longer ambiguous.

lineage.purpose: continuation rollouts to extend horizon coverage
clean/normalize — drop malformed rows, normalize whitespace, etc.
merge stages into single training file (~1137 rows pre-patch)
fix recoverable bugs (missing 🏷 X tags, unclosed 」, trailing }) and drop unfixable
lineage.patches_applied: missing-tag, trailing-junk, unclosed-response (counts logged at runtime, not retained)

checks: no unsatisfied todos (all defined ⊨ N satisfied)
termination: nothing after final 」 except chat-template tokens / known whitespace
call/result id pairing: every call ↦ {... id ↦ X ...} has matching 🏷 X

known_gaps: Trace records have no `meta` field — cannot recover per-row teacher, prompt id, or sampling params
No committed launch script for stages 1-3 — exact CLI flags are not reconstructible
Stage 5 (concat) is implicit; 1137 → 1098 transition is only documented here
Tool taxonomy used in synthesis is not pinned (lives only in generate_prompts.py at the time of run)
going_forward: Add `meta: {teacher_model, prompt_id, sampling_params, timestamp}` to every new trace
Commit a single `scripts/build_dataset.sh` Makefile-style entry point
Update this manifest on every regeneration
